name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off when you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently, and we just wanted to say: no pressure, and no hard feelings. Dental care should feel easy, not stressful — and if the timing or fit wasn't right, that's completely okay.

If you ever want to come back for a painless cleaning or a free new-patient consult, here's 20% off on us:

{{coupon.code}}

The code is good for the next 14 days. Just mention it when you book.

And if something specific wasn't working for you, I'd genuinely love to hear about it — hit reply, I read every message.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a gentle reminder your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is good for a few more days if you'd like to come back in. No pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
